warning.description: For `zxcvbn` validation, contains an end user consumable warning if the password is valid but not strong enough.

suggestions.description: For `zxcvbn` validation, contains end user consumable suggestions on how to improve the strength of the password.

luds_requirements.description: Contains which LUDS properties are fulfilled by the password and which are missing to convert an invalid password into a valid one. You'll use these fields to provide feedback to the user on how to improve the password.
